'''Gatrar Shey'Tyan''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who was the last Bothan [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Droid Trouble" />

==Appearances==
